name: python3-django-multiselectfield
title: python3-django-multiselectfield
summary: new model field and form field (Python 3)
description:
new model field and form field (Python 3)
This package contains a new model field and form field. With this you can get
a multiple select from a choice. It stores to the database as a CharField of
comma-separated values.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
